pkgmetadata.longdescription: HappyBaseHappyBase is a developer-friendly Python_ library to interact with ApacheHBase_. Documentation httpshappybase.readthedocs.io_ (Read the Docs) Downloads httppypi.python.orgpypihappybase_ (PyPI) Source code httpsgithub.comwbolsterhappybase_ (Github).. _Python httppython.org.. _HBase httphbase.apache.org.. If youre reading this from the README.rst file in a source tree, you can generate the HTML documentation by running make doc and browsing to docbuildhtmlindex.html to see the result.
